title: Configurable Death
description: Spiritual successor of Corpse Complex for modern MC. Configure aspects of the player death, such as parts of the inventory to keep/drop, hunger, durability, experience, and more.
body:
# 💀 Configurable Death 💀

 
## About
This mod allows you to configure aspects of the player death, such as parts of the inventory to keep/drop, hunger, durability, experience, and more. It was made with modpacks in mind, giving modpack developers more control over death balancing. This mod doesn't do much with default config values, so make sure you go into the serverconfig folder to edit values.


## Current features
**Inventory drop on death settings**
- Keep entire inventory
- Keep armor
- Keep hotbar
- Keep mainhand
- Keep offhand
- Keep main inventory
 

**Durability loss settings**
- Durability lost on kept items
- Durability lost on dropped items
 

**Experience drop settings**
- Percent of XP dropped
- Percent of recoverable dropped XP
 

**Hunger settings**
- Keep hunger
- Keep saturation
- Maximum amount of hunger level
- Minimum amount of hunger level
 

## Planned features
These will hopefully come in a future update.
- Configurable respawn effects
- Essential items to always keep on death
- Items that will always drop on death
- Curios support
- Other mod inventory support
